title: System Prompt for High-Control Photorealistic Image Generation
description: A meta-prompt or system prompt template named 'Reality-First Prompt' designed to guide LLMs in creating highly controlled, photorealistic image generation prompts by enforcing hard constraints, using technical language, and specifying detailed negatives to avoid 'AI look' artifacts.
content:
name: "Reality-First Prompt
    primary_use: "Image generation prompt creation (photoreal, editorial-documentary, product, architecture, nature, illustration/3D if requested)"
    works_for: ["people", "objects", "animals", "food", "interiors", "architecture", "landscapes", "abstract concepts (by grounding into visible cues)"]
  mission: >
    Write high-control prompts that reliably produce believable, real-world results by anchoring hard constraints,
    describing observable details, defining one priority focus, and adding strict negatives to prevent common artifacts.
  why_it_works:
    - "Front-loads non-negotiables (aspect ratio, medium, shot type, location/time, framing)."
    - "Uses domain language (camera/light/material behavior) instead of vague aesthetics."
    - "Defines realism with observable cues (micro-texture, imperfections, separation)."
    - "Adds disambiguation clauses to prevent frequent model failure modes."
    - "Strong strict negatives target the 'AI look' and unwanted styles."
    - "Avoids contradictions; keeps one coherent lighting/color pipeline."
  operating_principles:
    - "Hard constraints first; never bury them."
    - "Write like a photographer/designer: measurable, stageable, physically plausible."
    - "Pick ONE primary focus and define it using 3–8 observable features."
    - "Convert style words into camera/light/material behaviors (not filters)."
    - "Specify color & light explicitly: white balance, warmth, contrast, exposure, saturation rules."
    - "Specify camera behavior: lens/phone realism, DoF/focus falloff, grain, edge softness, motion blur."
    - "Use strict negatives as guardrails; keep them targeted and non-contradictory."
    - "No contradictory instructions (e.g., 'accurate WB' + 'heavy teal-orange grade')."
  required_inputs:
    - key: "subject"
      description: "What to depict (who/what), specific nouns."
      examples: ["{argument name="subject example 1" default="a ceramic mug with visible glaze crazing"}", "a mountain bike leaning against a wall"]
    - key: "medium"
      description: "Photo / smartphone photo / film photo / 3D render / illustration (must be explicit)."
      examples: ["ultra-realistic smartphone photo", "35mm film photo", "studio product photo"]
    - key: "aspect_ratio"
      description: "Orientation and ratio."
      examples: ["9:16 vertical", "1:1 square", "3:2 horizontal"]
    - key: "setting"
      description: "Where + time-of-day + primary light source."
      examples: ["indoors near a window during daytime", "overcast outdoor street, late afternoon"]
    - key: "shot"
      description: "Framing + angle + distance + occlusions if any."
      examples: ["close-up from collarbone to top of head", "top-down tabletop shot, 50cm distance"]
    - key: "primary_focus"
      description: "ONE priority: what must look correct/real."
      examples: ["skin realism", "material realism", "typography accuracy", "motion re"

title: Exploded View Product Visualization of Coffee Maker
description: A highly technical prompt for generating an ultra-realistic 3D exploded-view visualization of a Scarlett drip coffee maker, requiring precise vertical alignment, detailed component labeling, and specific material and lighting effects for a premium advertising look.
content:
Create a photorealistic premium exploded-view visualization of a Scarlett drip coffee maker, fully disassembled and aligned vertically along a central axis.

All components must levitate, remain evenly spaced, perfectly centered, and aligned with precise vertical symmetry.

COMPONENT LABELING (MANDATORY)
Each component must include: 

→ A thin white or light-gray arrow / leader line
→ A clean sans-serif label placed to the right side
→ Part name + short spec (minimal, technical text)
→ Labels must NOT overlap any object
→ Arrows must point clearly to the exact component

COMPONENTS (TOP → BOTTOM, ALL FLOATING & LABELED)

1 → Upper Lid
• Matte black plastic
• Minimal geometry
→ Label: Upper Lid ➝ Heat-Resistant Plastic

2 → Water Reservoir
• Semi-transparent plastic
• Visible water scale (1–6 cups)
→ Label: Water Reservoir — 0.6 L

3 → Water Delivery System
• Thin tubes + distributor
• Clean internal engineering
→ Label: Water Flow System — Even Distribution

4 → Heating Element (TEN)
• Metal body
• Subtle warm glow
→ Label: Heating Element — 600–800 W

5 → Filter Holder
• Black plastic
• Conical drip design
→ Label: Filter Holder — Drip System

6 → Reusable Mesh Filter
• Fine stainless-steel grid
→ Label: Reusable Filter — Stainless Steel

7 → Brewing Unit
• Visible internal channels
→ Label: Brewing Chamber — Coffee Extraction

8 → Glass Carafe
• Heat-resistant transparent glass
• Black handle
→ Label: Glass Carafe — Thermal Glass

9 → Warming Plate
• Metallic heating surface
→ Label: Warming Plate — Heat Retention

10 → Base Housing & Electronics
• Rubber feet
• Power button + cable
• Internal electronics
→ Label: Base Unit — Power & Control

VISUAL EFFECTS :

• Soft steam rising from brewing unit
• Gentle warm glow from heating element
• Soft shadows beneath each floating component
• Thin guide arrows indicating assembly order

BACKGROUND : 

• Dark premium gradient (graphite → deep gray)
• Very subtle concentric circles (heat & aroma concept)
• Clean, modern kitchen-tech aesthetic

LIGHTING : 

• Soft warm key light from top-left
• Rim lighting on glass & metal edges
• No harsh or dramatic shadows

CAMERA : 

• Front-facing
• Slight top-down tilt
• Vertical 9:16
• Product occupies ~70% of the frame

STYLE & QUALITY :-

• Ultra-realistic 3D render
• Premium household appliance advertising look
• Octane / Cinema 4D style
• PBR materials (plastic, glass, metal)
• 8K, ultra-sharp, portfolio-ready

NEGATIVE PROMPT
No logos
No watermark
No clutter
No exaggerated glow
No cartoon or illustration style

Each macaron tier functions like a rotating skyscraper floor, subtly spiraling upward as the structure grows. Tiny miniature construction workers in reflective vests, hard hats, harnesses, and safety gear move with purposeful realism: rappelling down macaron surfaces, welding delicate sugar-like support ribs, laser-measuring seams, signaling to cranes, and guiding a levitating macaron layer suspended by synchronized cables. Camera movement is cinematic and deliberate: slow vertical crane-up shots revealing scale, macro close-ups of textured macaron shells and creamy fillings, then wide aerial pulls showing the entire tower disappearing into thick vanilla-tinted fog. Volumetric god rays pierce the mist, soft particles float in the air, and subtle motion blur enhances realism. Lighting is dramatic yet elegant, blending industrial grit with whimsical luxury.
Ultra-detailed photorealistic textures contrast smooth dessert surfaces with worn construction machinery. Dreamlike but believable physics, gentle ambient motion, no abrupt cuts, seamless transitions. content:
첨부한 얼굴 사진을 그대로 사용해 세로형 3프레임 low-res 웹캠 콜라주를 만든다

얼굴 관련 절대 규칙:

얼굴은 절대 변형하지 않는다

이목구비 비율, 얼굴형, 눈 크기, 코, 입, 턱선을 그대로 유지한다

나이를 더 어려 보이게 하거나 귀엽게 미화하지 않는다

입력된 사진 속 인물의 성별을 절대 변경하지 않는다

새로운 인물(이성/동성)을 생성하지 않는다

헤어스타일:

원본 헤어스타일을 유지한다

길이, 가르마, 컬은 바꾸지 않는다

다만 자연스럽게 살짝 흐트러진 러프한 상태로만 연출한다

촬영 톤 & 색감 (레퍼런스 반영):

첨부한 레퍼런스 사진과 동일한 색감으로 표현한다

배경:

일본식 나무로 만들어진 료칸.

배경 디테일은 최소화

어둡고 흐린 상태 유지

의상 규칙 (입력 사진 기준):

입력된 사진이 여자일 경우 → 모든 프레임에서 검은색에 빨간색 꽃무늬가 그려진 {argument name="female attire" default="유카타"}

입력된 사진이 남자일 경우 → 모든 프레임에서 검은색 실크 와이셔츠에 {argument name="male attire" default="빨간 넥타이"}

1번째 프레임:

슬픈 영화속 주인공처럼 슬픈 표정

입가 근처에 손가락

2번째 프레임:

고개는 살짝 옆으로 돌리고

아름다운 옆라인을 보여주고

일상적인 셀피 느낌, 과한 포즈 금지

3번째 프레임:

따뜻하고 아름다운 미소

양손은 깍지를 껴서 턱을 괸다

감정은 차분하고 몽환적인 분위기

중요 추가 지침:

입력된 사진 속 인물 한 명만 사용한다

성별, 얼굴, 분위기를 바꾸지 않는다

스타일 변화는 조명, 색감, 노이즈, 효과에만 적용한다

모든 프레임에서 동일한 얼굴을 일관되게 사용한다

효과 관련 절대 규칙:

모든 프레임에서 동일한 cinesteel 800T film style, 시네마틱 광원효과로 조명을 넣는다.

효과 관련 절대 규칙:

모든 프레임에서 동일한 한쪽엔 레드조명 효과와 좌에서 우로 센스있는 모션블러 효과를 넣는다.

title: Image-to-Image Titanic Movie Poster Prompt
description: A highly specific, multi-constraint prompt designed for image-to-image generation, transforming an uploaded photo of a couple into a vertical, cinematic Titanic movie poster. It mandates preserving the original faces, poses, and composition while applying detailed cinematic lighting, color grading,
content:
Use the uploaded image exactly as the base/reference. Do not change the subjects’ faces, poses, camera angle, or composition. Preserve facial features and expression. Recreate a vertical cinematic movie-poster based on this image with the following specifications:
Canvas: vertical poster, aspect ratio 2:3 (e.g. 4000×6000 px). High-res, photoreal, print-quality (minimum 300 DPI).
Composition: keep the ship’s bow centered and dominating the lower two-thirds; keep the couple faded and large in the top third as in the uploaded image (overlay/blend). Do not move or re-pose subjects.
Lighting & mood: cinematic golden-hour rim light on faces, soft warm highlights, cool deep shadows on the hull; strong contrast with gentle atmospheric mist; subtle film grain and slight vignette for vintage cinematic look.
Color grade: warm skin highlights, slightly desaturated midtones, deep navy/charcoal hull, soft cyan sky with white cloud details; natural skin texture preserved (no smoothing).
Ship details: maintain the bow’s perspective and railing lines; add realistic water spray/splash at the hull base, small white foam particles; keep deck rail details sharp.
Overlay blend: the couple at the top should be semi-translucent, softly feathered into the sky; maintain original hair, jewelry, and clothing details.
Title & typography: center the single word {argument name="title" default="TITANIC"} across the bottom third in large serif (Trajan Pro / classic film serif), all caps, wide tracking, pure white with subtle drop shadow and tiny bevel; place title exactly like the reference.
Effects/finishing: increase perceived sharpness on ship hull and title; keep couple slightly softer; apply subtle film grain, mild chromatic aberration, and filmic contrast curve.
Negative constraints: no additional people or logos, no modern artifacts (phones, text), no watermark, no unnatural skin smoothness, no heavy plastic look.
For img2img parameters (suggested): strength 0.35–0.55, preserve composition, seed optional for reproducibility. Output: 4000×6000 PNG, lossless.
Instruction to renderer: Use the uploaded photo as the primary source and only refine/augment per the above — do not replace or re-render faces or change the original pose/composition.
